item.description: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 50min En respuesta a @BBCSPORTNI Live text commentary bbc.co.uk World Cup qualification: Live updates of Poland v Republic of Ireland Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from Poland vs Republic of Ireland in the Women's WC Qualification Europe 457
